calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Barry W. Ferns, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marmmoles Visemar, S.L., a Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Turk Stone, Inc., dba Mediterranean Passage.
Default entered against defendant on May 19, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on May 19, 2008.
Order granting of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 9, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marmoles Visemar S.L., a Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Turk Stone, Inc., dba Mediterranean Passage as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,607.63.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,993.84.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $390.00, for a total of $51,991.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
